SEARCH

Class Stadium

java.lang.Object
Venue
Stadium
Record Components:
id - venue ID
name - venue name
capacity - total capacity
concertCapacity - capacity for concerts
cost - venue cost
vipPercent - percentage of VIP seating
public class Stadium extends Venue
Creates a new Stadium venue.
